title: Minimum Number of Swaps to Make the Binary String Alternating
titleCn: 构成交替字符串需要的最小交换次数

testcases.input: s = "111000" Output: 1 Explanation: Swap positions 1 and 4: "111000" -> "101010" The string is now alternating.
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: Swap positions 1 and 4: "111000" -> "101010" The string is now alternating.

testcases.input: s = "010" Output: 0 Explanation: The string is already alternating, no swaps are needed.
testcases.expectedOutput: 0 Explanation: The string is already alternating, no swaps are needed.
